issues.title: [AI ECOSYSTEM][EPIC] Integrate the personal AI ecosystem through Mama Tổng Quản
issues.body:
## Outcome

Make `my-discord-bot` the only Discord gateway for generic advisor chat and the language, game, and health assistants while keeping all domain logic and data in their owning repositories.

## Scope

- Single-owner MVP only.
- Local HTTP/JSON connection to `chat-assistant`.
- No direct Ollama or assistant database access.
- No second Discord token for the AI ecosystem.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Every child issue is linked and ordered.
- [ ] Discord ownership, privacy, deployment, QA, release, and maintenance are covered.
- [ ] The epic does not absorb music responsibilities from `red-cogs`.

## Definition of done

The bot can expose the approved AI capabilities in the designated guild without violating repository or data boundaries.

issues.title: [REQUIREMENTS] Define owner-only AI command scope and user experience
issues.body:
## Outcome

Define the canonical Discord experience for Quân Sư and the three specialist assistants before commands are implemented.

## Scope

- Owner-only authorization for the MVP.
- Command groups, operation names, response visibility, and channel policy.
- Boundaries between lightweight local study commands and advanced language coaching.
- Generic advisor chat must remain distinct from health, game, and language operations.

## Dependencies

- Architecture baseline in `Dyu20705/chat-assistant`.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] A command-to-capability matrix exists.
- [ ] Every command has an owner, visibility, input limit, timeout class, and fallback policy.
- [ ] Public channels, DMs, and attachments are explicitly allowed or denied per capability.
- [ ] Future multi-user expansion is documented but not implemented.

issues.title: [DESIGN] Define the bot-to-gateway consumer boundary
match_titles: [INTEGRATION][DESIGN] Define my-discord-bot and ollama-assistant gateway boundary
issues.body:
## Outcome

Define the stable client boundary from `my-discord-bot` to `chat-assistant` without direct assistant or Ollama access.

## Scope

- Local HTTP/JSON transport on loopback or a private Docker network.
- Version negotiation, authentication, caller context, deadlines, cancellation, and stable errors.
- Discord attachment download and validation before gateway handoff.
- Mapping structured gateway results to Discord responses.

## Dependencies

- `Dyu20705/chat-assistant` topology, protocol, and identity/privacy decisions.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The bot remains the only Discord token owner.
- [ ] Permission checks and cooldowns run before gateway calls.
- [ ] No raw Discord objects cross the boundary.
- [ ] The client never parses human-oriented CLI output.
- [ ] Tests can use a deterministic fake gateway.

## Definition of done

A focused implementation issue can build the client without inventing transport or ownership rules.

issues.title: [IMPLEMENTATION] Build the authenticated local gateway client
issues.body:
## Outcome

Implement a bounded asynchronous client for the approved `chat-assistant` local HTTP/JSON API.

## Scope

- Connection pooling, deadlines, cancellation, request IDs, and schema-version headers.
- Local authentication with secret-safe configuration and rotation support.
- Typed success and error models.
- Readiness probe and circuit-breaker behavior suitable for one local service.

## Dependencies

- MDB-OD-001
- Chat Assistant consumer API and protocol.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The client never logs tokens or raw private content.
- [ ] Timeout, busy, unavailable, invalid-response, and incompatible-version paths are tested.
- [ ] No retry occurs for ambiguous state-changing operations.
- [ ] Shutdown closes all sessions cleanly.

issues.title: [FEATURE] Add owner-only Quân Sư generic advisor chat
issues.body:
## Outcome

Expose normal chatbot conversation and advisor functions through Mama Tổng Quản while delegating reasoning to the generic chat capability in `chat-assistant`.

## Scope

- Advisor operations for general chat, coding, research, planning, critique, and summarization.
- Bounded context and explicit reset/history controls.
- No implicit fallback into specialist health, language, or game capabilities.
- Theme-aware presentation can be enabled only after the production baseline is stable.

## Dependencies

- MDB-AI-003
- Generic advisor capability in `chat-assistant`.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] All commands are owner-only and guild-scoped.
- [ ] Long requests acknowledge the interaction before Discord timeout.
- [ ] Outputs are mention-safe, length-bounded, and paginated or file-backed when required.
- [ ] Generic chat failure cannot crash or block non-AI bot features.

issues.title: [INTEGRATION] Add advanced language-coaching Discord workflows
issues.body:
## Outcome

Expose advanced English and Japanese coaching through the gateway without duplicating `lang-assistant` logic.

## Scope

- Today's mission, answer correction, focused explanation/drill, and safe progress summary.
- Explicit separation from existing lightweight study logging and vocabulary utilities.
- Owner-only private responses by default.

## Dependencies

- MDB-AI-003
- Lang Assistant public application-service contract.
- Chat Assistant language adapter.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Commands call only gateway capabilities.
- [ ] Learner records are never read directly by the bot.
- [ ] Submission and correction flows preserve request identity and avoid duplicate writes.
- [ ] Unavailable language capability produces a safe, non-generic fallback message.

issues.title: [INTEGRATION] Add evidence-based game-coaching Discord workflows
issues.body:
## Outcome

Expose rhythm-game review and training-plan workflows while preserving the coach-only and non-cheat boundary.

## Scope

- Safe score/session submission.
- Optional approved attachment handoff for evidence.
- Coach review, weakness summary, training plan, and progress summary.
- No live gameplay assistance or game-client access.

## Dependencies

- MDB-AI-003
- Game Assistant public application-service contract.
- Chat Assistant attachment staging and game adapter.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Discord validates type and size before staging attachments.
- [ ] Opaque references expire and are cleaned after completion, timeout, or cancellation.
- [ ] The bot does not parse replays or inspect game files.
- [ ] Safety refusals are rendered without being overridden by generic chat.

issues.title: [INTEGRATION] Add private fail-closed health support workflows
issues.body:
## Outcome

Expose only approved Health Assistant capabilities through private owner-only Discord interactions.

## Scope

- Private symptom intake or health check-in as approved by Health Assistant.
- Profile, export, deletion, appointment-preparation, and reminder operations only when separately approved.
- No diagnosis, prescribing, dose changes, or generic-chat fallback.
- Emergency and urgent guidance must remain deterministic and visible.

## Dependencies

- Health Assistant safety gates and public contract.
- Chat Assistant health adapter.
- MDB-AI-003.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Responses are ephemeral by default.
- [ ] DMs, public channels, and attachments remain disabled until explicitly reviewed.
- [ ] Health content is excluded from operational logs.
- [ ] Gateway or Health Assistant failure returns a fail-closed message.
- [ ] Emergency text is never truncated or hidden behind optional UI.

issues.title: [RELIABILITY] Add AI feature flags, isolation, cooldowns, and graceful degradation
issues.body:
## Outcome

Keep the main bot reliable when the gateway, Ollama, or one specialist assistant is unavailable.

## Scope

- Independent feature flags for generic, language, game, and health capabilities.
- Per-user/per-capability cooldowns and concurrency limits.
- Startup readiness reporting without making AI availability a hard dependency.
- Safe cancellation and shutdown.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Non-AI commands remain available during every AI dependency failure.
- [ ] One unhealthy assistant does not disable the other capabilities.
- [ ] Repeated failures do not create retry storms or duplicate responses.
- [ ] Operational status reports capability readiness without exposing secrets or private content.

issues.title: [TEST] Add gateway-client, command-adapter, and contract tests
issues.body:
## Outcome

Create deterministic tests for the complete Discord-side AI integration without live Discord, Ollama, or assistant services.

## Scope

- Fake gateway client and protocol fixtures.
- Authorization, timeout, cancellation, error mapping, message splitting, and attachment cleanup.
- Command registration and feature-flag tests.
- Compatibility fixtures shared with `chat-assistant`.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Tests cover all stable gateway error codes.
- [ ] No test uses real tokens, guild IDs, user data, or network services.
- [ ] State-changing operations prove idempotency or explicit non-retry behavior.
- [ ] Contract drift fails CI.

issues.title: [QA] Validate permissions, privacy, and interaction lifecycle in the designated guild
issues.body:
## Outcome

Execute a manual QA matrix for the exact bot release candidate and the owner-only AI surface.

## Scope

- Owner, admin, moderator, trusted, and member actors.
- Allowed and denied channels.
- Ephemeral/public behavior, defer/follow-up behavior, long output, cancellation, and attachment cleanup.
- Generic, language, game, and health failure paths.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Only the owner can invoke MVP AI capabilities.
- [ ] No private content appears in public channels or logs.
- [ ] Every command completes, cancels, or fails within its documented lifecycle.
- [ ] Evidence is secret-safe and tied to an exact SHA.

issues.title: [DEPLOY] Add private-network gateway configuration and operations
issues.body:
## Outcome

Deploy Mama Tổng Quản beside `chat-assistant` using loopback or a private Docker network with reproducible secrets and health checks.

## Scope

- Environment variables and secret rotation.
- Compose/service dependency without making startup permanently block on AI readiness.
- Resource limits, restart policy, logs, backup boundaries, and network exposure checks.
- Windows local-development instructions and Linux production instructions.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The gateway is never exposed publicly.
- [ ] The Discord token remains only in `my-discord-bot`.
- [ ] Deploy, upgrade, rollback, and incident checks are documented.
- [ ] A broken AI service does not restart-loop the Discord bot.

issues.title: [RELEASE] Validate the owner-only AI ecosystem through Discord
issues.body:
## Outcome

Validate the exact five-repository release set from Discord input through the gateway and selected assistants.

## Scope

- Generic advisor chat.
- One complete language coaching flow.
- One evidence-based game coaching flow.
- Health integration only after all safety gates pass.
- Restart, timeout, cancellation, backup/restore, and rollback.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Every tested repository SHA and model/prompt version is recorded.
- [ ] No second AI Discord bot is required.
- [ ] Failure injection proves safe degradation.
- [ ] Health release evidence includes safety and privacy acceptance.
- [ ] Rollback restores the previous working bot and gateway.

issues.title: [MAINTENANCE] Define compatibility, incident, and deprecation policy for AI commands
issues.body:
## Outcome

Keep the Discord command surface stable while gateway and assistant contracts evolve.

## Scope

- Supported protocol-version window.
- Feature deprecation and command migration.
- Incident severity, rollback triggers, and dependency outage handling.
- Future multi-user authorization migration.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Breaking changes require compatibility fixtures and release notes.
- [ ] Deprecated commands have an announced replacement and removal gate.
- [ ] No assistant upgrade silently broadens permissions or data access.
- [ ] Quarterly review checks stale feature flags, secrets, dependencies, and runbooks.
